problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway
hypothesis: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of CRISPR. CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
